name: Shiva Mills Limited
summary: Shiva Mills Limited manufactures and markets cotton yarns and fabric in India and internationally. The company also operates 22 windmills with an installed capacity of 10.65 MW. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as STYL Textile Ventures Limited and changed its name to Shiva Mills Limited in August 2017. Shiva Mills Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
